summary: Fixture manifest for Lane B azurerm create_resource golden cases (0039 Azure-seam Wave-1) — proves the provider-shape tables let create_resource emit azurerm_* resources and render azurerm_* references as HCL expressions, not string literals. Extended by Lane K with a set_attribute tags map-merge op for the azurerm tag-key case-collision guard golden fixtures, and by the catalogctl Azure-executability verify lane with a scalar target.attr min_tls_version op (mirrors the real azure-storage-account-set-min-tls-version).

operations.title: Create a storage account
operations.description: Creates a new azurerm_storage_account top-level resource block.

operations.title: Create a storage account inside an existing resource group
operations.description: Creates a new azurerm_storage_account whose resource_group_name references an existing azurerm_resource_group.

operations.title: Update storage account tags
operations.description: Sets or merges tags on the storage account. Non-disruptive, takes effect immediately.

params.name: tags
params.label: Tags
params.help: Key/value tags to set; existing keys not listed here are left untouched.

operations.title: Set minimum TLS version
operations.description: Sets the minimum TLS version accepted for requests to the storage account. Tighten-only: this operation offers TLS 1.2 only; moving to an older, weaker minimum is engineer-authored.

params.name: storage_account
params.label: Storage account
params.help: The storage account whose minimum TLS version to set.

params.name: min_tls_version
params.label: Minimum TLS version
params.help: The minimum TLS version clients must use to connect. Only the modern, secure minimum (TLS 1.2) is offered here.
